nasb.text: So Samuel told him everything and hid nothing from him. And he said, “It is the Lord; let Him do what seems good to Him.”

esv.text: So Samuel told him everything and hid nothing from him. And he said, “It is the Lord. Let him do what seems good to him.”

cnv.text: 於是撒母耳把一切話都告訴了以利，一句也沒有隱瞞。以利說：“他是耶和華，他看怎麼好，就怎麼行吧。”

ccb.text: 撒母耳就一五一十地告诉了他。以利说：“祂是耶和华，祂看怎样好，就怎样行吧。”
